Document:
# CRIMINAL CODE Offenses are divided by category. The following sections detail each class of crime.
- [textlink="Optional Add-On Charges" link="AU14CCLawOptionalCharges"] - [textlink="Minor Crimes" link="AU14CCLawMinorCrimes"] - [textlink="Arms Control & Weapons Statutes" link="AU14CCLawArmsControl"] - [textlink="Major Crimes" link="AU14CCLawMajorCrimes"] - [textlink="Capital Crimes" link="AU14CCLawCapitalCrimes"]
